Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We note the assumed normal process flow as per the prompt is Register Order Perform Credit Check Validate Stock Confirm Shipment Ship Goods Issue Invoice Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets examine each case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1001 Follows the normal flow exactly No anomaly

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 Events Register Order Confirm Shipment without prior Validate Stock or Perform Credit Check Ship Goods Perform Credit Check after shipping Validate Stock after shipping Issue Invoice Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomaly The order was shipped before credit check and stock validation This is a serious process violation

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 Events Register Order Perform Credit Check Ship Goods without prior Validate Stock or Confirm Shipment Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment after shipping Receive Payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomaly The order was shipped without stock validation and the shipment confirmation happened after shipping Also note that Confirm Shipment is after Ship Goods which is out of order

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 Events Register Order Receive Payment immediately after order registration without any other steps Issue Invoice Confirm Shipment with shipment scheduled N Ship Goods

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Anomalies Payment was received before invoice was issued and without credit check stock validation and shipment confirmation The shipment confirmation has additional info shipment scheduled N which might indicate that the shipment was not scheduled but then it was shipped

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Case 1002 Possibly the steps were done in a rush for a priority order order type is priority and the process was expedited without proper checks Alternatively there might be a system error that allowed the steps to be recorded out of order

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Case 1003 The warehouse might have shipped the goods without checking stock leading to a potential stock issue The late confirmation of shipment might be due to a delay in updating the system

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: For Case 1004 This could be a prepaid order but note that the normal flow still requires credit check and stock validation before shipping The payment was received very early which might indicate a different process for prepaid orders but then the credit check is still required The shipment scheduled N in Confirm Shipment but then shipped might indicate an override or error

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We are to propose SQL queries to investigate these hypotheses further We note that we have three tables order event log orders and resources Possible queries For Case 1002 priority order Check if there are other priority orders that had similar issues For each case we might want to check the time differences between events to see if there are unusual time gaps Check if the same resource is involved in multiple anomalies Check for orders that are missing required steps like credit check or have steps in the wrong order For Case 1004 check if there are other orders that received payment before other steps

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: We can write queries to List all cases that have a step performed out of order according to the normal flow For each case check if the normal sequence of activities is followed

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets assign Register Order 1 Perform Credit Check 2 Validate Stock 3 Confirm Shipment 4 Ship Goods 5 Issue Invoice 6 Receive Payment 7 Then for each event in a case we can assign the expected sequence number and then compare with the actual sequence of events

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We can also check for missing steps by comparing the set of activities in a case with the set of normal activities

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 3 Check for orders that were shipped before credit check or stock validation

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 4 Check for orders that received payment before invoice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 5 Check for resources involved in anomalies We can join the events with the resources table to see the role and department of the resources involved in out of order events

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Step 1 Identify anomalies in each case Step 2 Hypothesize reasons Step 3 Propose SQL queries to investigate
